name: Pizza Bm Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first three ingredients into the bread pan. Add water. Close the cover and place dry yeast in the yeast holder.
2. Select: BASIC DOUGH MODE. Press start.
The Breadmaker will complete the basic dough mode in 2 hours and 25 minutes.
3. Divide the dough into 4 equal portions. Roll each portion into a ball.
4. Place on a lightly floured surface. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 20 minutes.
5. Roll out each ball into a flat circle.
6. Place on a greased baking pan. Prick the surface with a fork.
7. Brush with 2 tablespoons pizza sauce. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over top. Garnish with ingredients of your choice.
8. Bake in an oven set to 500°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until fully cooked and the dough is crisp and slightly brown.
